tasks.instruction: From the SDS library, filter to SDS used on Production Line 2 that expire within the next 90 days, select all of them, and save them as a new review list named "SDS Review - Next 90 Days".

tasks.instruction: Locate an SDS that has at least four historical revisions, compare its two most recent revisions, go to the PPE section, and save a comparison note reminding to review PPE changes between the last two revisions.

tasks.instruction: In the SDS library, filter to corrosive cleaning chemicals that have a Spanish-language SDS, sort by daily usage from highest to lowest, and add the first 3 with daily usage over 5 L/day to the "Custodial Team - Corrosives" quick access group.

tasks.instruction: On the dashboard, add a chemical-count-by-location widget that shows the number of Category 1 carcinogenic substances per building for Buildings A, B, and C, sets an alert threshold of 10 items, and titles it "Cat 1 Carcinogens by Building".
